title: Personal portable apparatus attached to wheeled market baskets that avoid contact against bacteria and virus infection
abstract: The present invention relates to a portable apparatus that can be attached to and removed from the basket mounted piece, which prevents the transmission of bacteria and viruses from contact with wheeled market baskets used by everyone in the markets.
claims: Claims 1. The invention is a portable apparatus that can be attached to and removed from the wheeled market baskets that are used by everyone in the supermarkets, preventing the contamination of bacteria and viruses by contact, characterized in that; comprises parts (4) mounted on the wheeled basket, a personalized portable apparatus (5) that prevents the transmission of bacteria or viruses by contact, the part that is worn on the wrist after the apparatus is removed (6).
